thoughts_pipelinesandbox_643318131285.content: Agent is sandboxed to task directory only (/.kody/tasks/<id>/) and cannot access parent dirs, src/, or package.json — Explore agents also fail due to same model restriction.

conventions_nextjs_643319548335.content: Chart/table components in Next.js server-component dashboards must use 'use client' directive even if parent is a server component.

conventions_frontend_643321547044.content: No chart/table libraries pre-installed (no recharts, chart.js, tanstack-table) — must install dependency first before using.

facts_build_643322799259.content: The build stage should run `npm install` and `npm run build` after code changes to verify compilation succeeds; skipping this means build errors go undetected.
